description_long: This book features a striking cover with a geometric, diamond-patterned brown section running vertically along one edge, contrasting with a solid dark surface that covers the majority of the front and back. The patterned area appears textured, possibly simulating leather or fabric, while the rest of the cover is smooth and matte. The book is of medium thickness, with a visible spine that is segmented and colored in a reddish-brown tone, suggesting a classic or vintage style. The edges of the book are clean and straight, and the corners are slightly rounded. There is a small, subtle circular emblem or mark on the lower portion of the cover, adding a touch of detail. No visible illustration or prominent artwork is present on the front cover, giving the book a formal and understated appearance.
description: A medium-thickness book with a dark, matte cover and a textured brown geometric pattern along one edge, featuring a subtle circular emblem.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing a reddish-brown segmented design with a slightly raised texture.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, dominated by a dark matte surface and a brown diamond-patterned strip along the left edge, with a small circular emblem near the bottom.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the top or bottom edge, appearing as a thin, solid, light-colored strip.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, mirroring the front with a dark matte surface and the brown patterned strip now on the right edge.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is reddish-brown with segmented, slightly raised sections, giving it a classic, textured appearance. No visible text or decorative elements are present.
